chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st Appeal No.D- 24 of 2002 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Appl in d/o case 1.For orders on CMA 632/2023 2.For orders on CMA 633/2023 3.For orders of CMA 634/2023 4.For orders of CMA 631/2023 04-05-2023 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General–Sindh along with Waseem, Assistant Commissioner / Land Acquisition Officer, Rohri. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3&4. By means of application (CMA-631/2023) filed under Section 12 CPC, the applicant / Land Acquisition Officer/ Assistant Commissioner / DDO (Revenue), Rohri seeks setting aside the order dated 24.04.2019, passed by this Court in the instant appeal on the ground, inter alia, that the same has been obtained by way of misrepresentation and playing fraud. Learned AAG also files statement to the effect that to the satisfaction of this Court, the Assistant Commissioner/LAO, Rohri is ready to deposit Rs. 3,70,500/- being original amount of enhancement of 24.29 acres of land along with 6% interest, total amounting to Rs. 9,70,710/- with the Additional Registrar of this Court till final decision of instant application. Learned AAG in view of aforementioned written statement seeks suspension of 1st Appeal No.D-24 of 2002 Page 2 of 2 proceedings in Execution Application No.05 of 2022, pending adjudication before the Court of II-Additional District Judge, Sukkur. With prejudice to the right and interest of the appellant, let aforementioned amount of Rs.9,70,710/- be deposited by the Assistant Commissioner/LAO, Rohri with the Additional Registrar of this Court within ten days hereof.

Learned AAG in view of aforementioned written statement seeks suspension of 1st Appeal No.D-24 of 2002 Page 2 of 2 proceedings in Execution Application No.05 of 2022, pending adjudication before the Court of II-Additional District Judge, Sukkur. With prejudice to the right and interest of the appellant, let aforementioned amount of Rs.9,70,710/- be deposited by the Assistant Commissioner/LAO, Rohri with the Additional Registrar of this Court within ten days hereof. Office is directed to issue notice to the appellant through his legal heirs through first three modes. Adjourned to 23.05.2023. Meanwhile, proceedings under aforementioned Execution Application shall remain suspended before the Court of learned II-Additional District Judge, Sukkur till further orders. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
